executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed due to missing GitHub Actions workflow file. The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository, preventing any build execution. This is a critical configuration error that must be resolved before any Maven builds can be attempted.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found error. The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository loginkarun/scib_demo on branch main.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The required GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) is missing from the repository. This file is necessary to define the CI/CD pipeline for building the Maven project.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created. This blocks all CI/CD automation, testing, and deployment processes.

errors.title: Workflow Dispatch API Endpoint Failure
errors.description: The GitHub Actions API endpoint for workflow dispatch is returning 404, indicating the workflow cannot be triggered programmatically.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.root_cause: The workflow dispatch API requires a valid workflow file to exist in the repository. Without the file, the API endpoint returns 404 and cannot trigger any workflow runs.
errors.impact: Automated build triggers are non-functional. Manual and automated CI/CD processes cannot initiate builds, affecting development velocity and deployment pipelines.

recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file with a standard Maven build configuration.
recommended_fixes.implementation: Use the GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create .github/workflows/build.yml with Maven build steps including: checkout, setup-java, maven build, test execution, and artifact publishing.

recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the GitHub token has proper workflow and actions permissions to dispatch workflows.
recommended_fixes.implementation: Review token permissions in GitHub settings and ensure 'workflow' scope is enabled. Verify Actions are enabled for the repository.

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error analysis performed on attempt 3 after repeated workflow dispatch failures. All attempts resulted in HTTP 404 errors indicating missing workflow configuration.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerabilities detected. This is a configuration issue that prevents build execution.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: Build pipeline non-functional. Cannot verify compliance requirements until workflow is operational.
